goal_text:
You are planning your trip in Cambridge.
You are looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the type of 'mutliple sports' and should be in the 'east'.
Make sure you get 'address' and 'postcode'.
You are also looking for a 'train'. The train should 'leave after 13:30' and should depart from 'bishops stortford'.
The train should leave on 'sunday' and should go to 'cambridge'.
Make sure you get 'price'.Remember. You don't want booking for train. Just get the information and it all done.
